title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: They painted the school during the summer break.
example.secondSentence: The school (1) _________ during the summer break.

questions.firstSentence: It is not essential to register in advance.
He is not as hardworking as he used to be.
questions.secondSentence: He is (1) _________ he used to be.

questions.firstSentence: She continued running even though she was exhausted.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ even though she was exhausted.

questions.firstSentence: He was obliged to pay a fine for parking illegally.
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ a fine for parking illegally.

questions.firstSentence: He said, 'I will definitely come to your party.'
Without the map, they would have got lost.
questions.secondSentence: If they hadn't had the map, they would (1) _________ lost.
